title: MultiSelect
description: Multi-select with chips, search and bulk selection. Designed for medium-sized lists where users need to pick multiple options.

searchable.title: Searchable and select all
searchable.desc: Combines search with a toggle to select or deselect all at once.

maxChips.title: Collapsed chips
maxChips.desc: When many items are selected, max-visible-chips collapses the rest into a +N badge.

maxSelected.title: Selection limit
maxSelected.desc: max-selected prevents exceeding the specified number of options.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes for different form contexts.

props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when nothing is selected.
props.errorText: Error message that replaces the helperText.
props.color: Semantic color for the control and the chips.
props.radius: Border radius of the trigger and chips.
props.clearable: Shows an X button to clear all selections.
props.searchable: Activates the search input in the panel.
props.showSelectAll: Shows a "Select all" button in the panel.
props.maxVisibleChips: Number of chips before collapsing to "+N".
props.loading: Shows a spinner instead of the chevron.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the root control.
props.iconLeft: Icon rendered to the left of the trigger.
props.name: Generates hidden inputs for form submission.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the selection array changes.

types.title: MultiSelect
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the MultiSelect component props. Uses SelectOption for its options array. See the Select page for the option shape.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbArrow: Navigate between options; Space toggles selection
a11y.ariaExpanded: Communicates whether the dropdown panel is open or closed
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the trigger for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusNative: Uses a native button as trigger — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusTrap: Focus is trapped inside the dropdown panel while it is open
